Appearances:
Plaintiff Gaetani Real Estate is present. Represented by Marcus Gaetani.
Attorney Daniel Bornstein for the plaintiff.
Defendant Elizabeth Lewis is present.
Attorney Patrick Hill appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Paul Perdue, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 501A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of NOV-25-2013 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
